The '''HB-9 rifle''',<ref name="Chronicles">''[[Star Wars Chronicles: The Prequels]]''</ref> also known simply as the '''HB-9'''<ref name="VD" /> or '''Utapaun Blaster Rifle''',<ref name="BftG">''[[Star Wars: Battles for the Galaxy]]''</ref> was a model of [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] manufactured by [[Zenoti Arms/Legends|Zenoti Arms]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] era. These rifles were popular with the natives of [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]]. The ornate Zenoti Arms HB-9 was a long-range [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] rifle with an intricately-patterned [[Barrel/Legends|barrel]] and an elegant, curving [[Stock/Legends|stock]] and shoulder brace. It featured a front sight over the tip of the barrel and a hand-turned recharge valve. The ignition housing was primitive,<ref name="VD" /> although the weapon still delivered a powerful blast.

[[Tion Medon/Legends|Tion Medon]]'s [[Pau'an/Legends|Pau'an]] warriors carried HB-9s during the [[Battle of Utapau/Legends|Battle of Utapau]].
